title: Sales Channels - Activating the Pay on pick up functionality
workflow_title: Activating the Pay on pick up functionality

steps.caption: Welcome. This guide shows how to activate the Pay on pick up functionality for self-service.
Go to Self-service, then Sales channels.
Edit the sales channel for the Webshop (Order2POS).
On the General tab, scroll to the Pick-up section and switch on "Allow pay on pickup".
Click Save to apply, then transmit the change via General → Send.
